name: io.github.aimnis/search
description: Collaborative, cache-first web search for agents — cited answers from a shared, live web pool.

runtimeArguments.name: --from
runtimeArguments.description: Install the package with the MCP extra, then run its console script.

environmentVariables.name: AIMNIS_GATEWAY_URL
environmentVariables.description: URL of the hosted Aimnis gateway to join the shared pool (e.g. https://api.aimnis.org). Omit to run fully local against your own Postgres (set AIMNIS_DATABASE_URL instead).

environmentVariables.name: AIMNIS_GATEWAY_CLIENT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: API key for the hosted gateway (required when AIMNIS_GATEWAY_URL is set).
